title: Cirrus: Use branch-specific image tags
body:
Also, since 19.04 is EOL, update to Ubuntu 19.10 + Backport use of OBS packages.

Signed-off-by: Chris Evich <cevich@redhat.com>

comments.body: Hrmmm, not sure about the test failures.  It's possible they are flakes as there was a github or cirrus 'hiccup' in the last few minutes  (I saw some tests elsewhere, get auto-rescheduled b/c `git clone` problems).  I removed the ***WIP*** from this PR, since otherwise it's ready to go.  I'm just out of time waiting for the tests to fail, so I can smash the 're-run' button :confounded:
We marked everything as optional for one of the branches because we weren't expecting the tests to pass because the VMs might be different?
I swore it was 1.6, but that appears to be incorrect. It was 1.4.2: https://github.com/containers/libpod/commit/9a50c1c2f85952edd4fc2873ce6a0845394c2613
I think we need basically the same treatment here. If we need to merge this before you're back, I'll take over and do so.

> I swore it was 1.6, but that appears to be incorrect. It was 1.4.2

Double-drat, well this PR will fix CI for the `v1.6` branch (it is genuinely broken) based on #6178

I did ***NOT*** enable any cron-based "keep-alive" builds for `v1.4.2` tag only `v1.4.2-stable` branch.  If a similar fix is needed for `1.4.2-stable` while I'm away, the process is documented.  For reference, the main trouble I ran into here was Ubuntu 19.04 no longer existing (it's 19.10 now) and the older `ubuntu_setup.sh` trying/failing to use the old PPA's.  So I cherry-picked the OBS setup from master and back-ported it here.
A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.

oh :hankey: completely forgot about this. Thanks for the reminder @rhatdan 

@baude FYI...this use to work on the 1.6 branch :smile:  I'm working on it now and will let you know when it's ready.  Sorry for dropping the ball.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *cevich*, *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/v1.6/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

@baude summary of our chat:  This PR is ready to go in, fresh VM images are built and there are some other small changes to help keep the v1.6 branch chooching.  However, we decided that the ongoing maintenance of this setup for old/gold branches is too heavy.  You're going to work up a PR that greatly simplifies CI for old branches.  I'll close this PR now, but if we need it or pieces of it, it can be re-opened and should still be valid for a few more weeks.
